main.name: Taras & Lisa
main.heroHeadline: Two people who never really stopped moving
main.heroSubhead: We've hitchhiked more countries than we can count, tried nearly every sport that looked fun, and somewhere along the way turned all of it into things we teach. Couples coaching. Mountain guiding. Snowboarding. A few other things too.
aboutBody: We're Taras and Lisa. Partners in life, now partners in whatever's next too.
We got together hitchhiking with no fixed route, saying yes to sports neither of us had tried, collecting friends in every town we passed through. That restlessness turned out useful.

These days we teach it: how to actually talk to people instead of just arguing better, reading a mountain, falling on a slope without trashing your knee, and how to keep moving when everything in you wants to stop. Still doing it side by side.
main.aboutPhotoAlt: Taras and Lisa on a hiking trail
main.contactBody: Tell us what you're after — a session, a lesson, a trek, or something in between — and we'll get back to you.
